title: Engadget Podcast: Is Siri AI actually useful in iOS 27 and macOS Golden Gate? - Engadget
summary: Also, we try to make sense of OpenAI's rumored AI smart speaker. In this episode, Devindra and Nathan Ingraham dive into their thoughts around Siri AI, as well as the performance improvements in these new releases.
